title: 10 best herbal tinctures for throat irritation
description: Peppermint tinctures helps with throat irritation because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The menthol present in peppermint soothes and calms the mucous membranes in the throat, reducing inflammation and discomfort caused by irritants or allergies. Additionally, peppermint's cooling sensation helps to numb the affected area, providing immediate relief from itching and soreness.
